case_title: MYRNA CASTANEDA VS. JOHN HIDER et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTANEDA, MYRNA AS TO DEFENDANT HIDER, JOHN DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-25-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-27-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-10-2011

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTANEDA, MYRNA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-01-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FEB-01-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-09-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-25-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-09-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST MYRNA CASTANEDA FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-09-2011, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-24-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-09-2011 CONTINUED TO JUL-11-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-11-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
